title: vincetoxicum zollingeri
intro: Vincetoxicum zollingeri, also known as the Zollinger's swallowwort or Chinese swallowwort, is a plant species belonging to the milkweed family (Asclepiadaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Vincetoxicum zollingeri include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often dried and processed into teas, capsules, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Journal of biological regulators and homeostatic agents", vincetoxicum zollingeri (also known as Viscumin) may be useful as an adjuvant in the biological therapy of cancer due to its ability to stimulate the immune system as a powerful inflammatory mediator.
